item.title: Aerocapture Mission to Mars
item.description: Investigating how using aerocapture could reduce the fuel needed for an orbiting mission to Mars.

item.title: Hyperloop
item.description: Designing a Hyperloop vehicle for international competitions, focusing on levitation and suspension.

item.title: Robotics Room
item.description: Building a hardware-in-the-loop robotics lab for testing computer vision and guidance algorithms.

item.title: Local Reduction for Robust Optimal Control
item.description: Master's thesis investigating local reduction robust optimal control methods for lunar landers.

item.title: Simulator
item.description: Developing a high-accuracy proprietary simulator for orbital dynamics and mission validation.

item.title: VLEO Satellite Mission
item.description: Feasibility study of a mission to fly in very low earth orbit (VLEO) using current technology.

item.title: RPO Kit Development
item.description: Leading engineering for the RPO Kit, including high-precision orbit propagation and filter development.
